parameters.architecture: GQA (8 KV heads, 32 attn heads, 4.0x ratio)

prediction_outcome: GQA-general prediction DISCONFIRMED. V>K on Mistral (9/12 layers). Qwen-specific prediction CONFIRMED: digital encoding drives K>V, not GQA.
key_finding: V > K probing on Mistral-7B (GQA, analog) at 9/12 layers (75%), K-V diff=-0.017. DISCONFIRMS GQA compression as driver of K>V probing. 3-model taxonomy: digital→K>V (Qwen only), analog→V≥K (Phi MHA + Mistral GQA). K>V probing is Qwen/digital-SPECIFIC.
evidence_impact: RESOLVES exp_093 open question. K>V probing depends on ENCODING (digital vs analog), not ARCHITECTURE (GQA vs MHA). Universal K>V perturbation fragility dissociated from encoding-dependent probing content.
next_planned: Cycle 95 = literature scan (95 is not divisible by 10... next lit scan at cycle 100). Could pursue: (1) Qwen-Instruct K vs V sweep (does instruction tuning change digital→K>V?), (2) deeper WRRA analysis, (3) layer-specific attention pattern analysis

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: FINAL: K>V perturbation fragility universal (5 models). K>V probing ENCODING-DEPENDENT: digital (Qwen)→K wins, analog (Phi MHA + Mistral GQA)→V wins. NOT driven by GQA compression (Exp 094).

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep on 2 families + 2 sizes. Layer sweeps for K+V on 3 models. K vs V encoding-dependent (exp 091-094). Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPREHENSIVE: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 position-sweep (2 families + 2 sizes). K vs V layer sweep on Qwen, Phi, AND Mistral (exp 094). 3-model K/V taxonomy complete.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: digital→K>V probing, analog→V≥K probing. Encoding determines K/V information balance, not architecture.
